Security

Trust is part of the product

Barristrly is built for confidential legal work — role gates, escrow, COI-aware matching, and audit trails.

Request security brief

Controls

Role-based access

Client, lawyer, firm, and platform admin portals with middleware gates.

Escrow controls

Fees held until milestones clear — reducing payment disputes.

Audit events

Analytics and admin audit surfaces for sensitive actions.

Document vault

Matter documents stored with scoped access for engagement parties.

Privacy-first matching

COI screening before full exposure of party identities.

Enterprise roadmap

SSO and deeper identity controls available via enterprise engagement.

FAQ

How is client data handled?

Matter data is access-scoped by role. Portals enforce client, lawyer, and admin boundaries.

Are consultations encrypted?

Consult meetings are designed for encrypted sessions with consent recorded before engagement.

What about conflicts?

COI workflows support double-blind screening before counsel sees full client identity where required.

Do you support enterprise reviews?

Yes — security questionnaires and roadmap items (SSO/API) are handled through sales and compliance.

Need a questionnaire completed?

Send your security pack — we respond with architecture and control mapping.

Contact us
